name: Tuna Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pk (10-oz) frozen broccoli thawed, chopped and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 1 quart casserole dish with cooking spray.
2. In a 2 quart saucepan melt 1/4 cup margarine over medium heat. Add onion; saute until translucent, about 3 minutes.
3. In a small bowl stir cornstarch, milk and hot pepper sauce until smooth; add to onions in saucepan.
4. Stir in the bouillon cubes, stirring constantly. Bring to a boil and boil for 1 minute.
5. In a large bowl combine the sauce, tuna, broccoli, cooked elbow macaroni (6 oz), and 1 cup shredded cheese.
6. Pour into prepared casserole dish.
7. In a small bowl combine bread crumbs, remaining 1/4 cup cheese and melted margarine; sprinkle over casserole.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until the topping is lightly browned.
